title: Poroto's Zombies
description: A new look and variants for Zombies!
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/m01r2xH.png)

**From 1.16.5 to the latest Minecraft versions.**

The **Poroto's Zombies** Pack adds a re-interpretation look for Minecraft Zombies, adding **over 100 skins** just to bring more variety to your encounters.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rT5H8Rg9e5w" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**Recommended mods:**
- Optifine.
- If you don't want to use Optifine, I recommend **[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)** instead.

**Compatibility:**

- Poroto's Zombies should work with any Resource Pack or Mod that adds new animations to zombies. This pack only modifiesthe textures.
- If you're using a Resource Pack that changes Zombie properties, try to always place the Poroto's Zombies Pack on top.

**Progress (3/5):**

- Normal Zombies (Complete)
- Baby Zombies (Complete)
- Husk (Complete)
- Drowned (W.I.P.)
- Biome Variants (W.I.P.)
